basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in Manufacturing/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines (CGPA ≥ 6.0/10.0 or marks ≥ 60%) with GATE qualified
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech. in Manufacturing/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines (having CGPA ≥ 6.0/10.0 or marks ≥ 60%) with GATE qualified. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines from IITs with CGPA≥8.0 or M.E./M.Tech. in Manufacturing/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines from IITs with CGPA ≥ 8.0 are exempted from GATE. Desirable: Experience with WAAM, Material characterization and FE modeling is highly desirable.

salary_details.details: INR 37,000.00 + HRA as per institute rules

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.E./M.Tech. in Manufacturing/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines (having CGPA ≥ 6.0/10.0 or marks ≥ 60%) with GATE qualified. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines from IITs with CGPA≥8.0 or M.E./M.Tech. in Manufacturing/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines from IITs with CGPA ≥ 8.0 are exempted from GATE. Desirable: Experience with WAAM, Material characterization and FE modeling is highly desirable.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.E./M.Tech. in Manufacturing/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines with a CGPA of 6.0/10.0 or 60% marks, and must be GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow role at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. Are candidates with B.E./B.Tech. from IITs exempted from GATE?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical/Production/Materials or allied engineering disciplines from IITs with a CGPA of 8.0 or above are exempted from GATE.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit specified for this position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits for this position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
